paragraphs.body: My name is Diego Morales and I am a student at Pitt university. I read your decision tree “Are You Allowed to Criticize Simone Biles?” This diagram exemplified the idea that you should not be criticizing Simone Biles unless you are literally her. From your reading I learned key knowledge which significantly increased my own intellect; that being that I'm not Simone Biles, and because I'm not Simone Biles I should not be criticizing her. It’s also vital to learn empathy based on criticism, criticism and advice can be very similar because they are both forms of feedback in hopes of improvement. However, when criticism or advice is given from a point of view lacking experience, knowledge, and ability, it generally comes off as angry hating and nothing worth listening to, otherwise what most people know as ‘criticism’. From anecdotal experience I have had friends tell me what to do from a spectating position on multiple occasions whilst playing games together, otherwise known as backseat gaming. Backseat gaming makes my own gaming experience very difficult due to the constant unnecessary buzzing noise in my ears that is barely even able to form coherent sentences nevertheless sentences that make any sense. This is incredibly frustrating because they have no idea what I'm thinking or going through as they are not me or are in my position. Although your diagram does make a great point, it does come off as very aggressive at some points. I would only imagine this kind of angry message would only piss off the angry haters and critics even more, at the end of the day not really helping. Regardless, due to this brilliant diagram you drew up I will hopefully now be able to convey to my friends how annoying they really are, without significantly hurting their feelings. This diagram is a great tool for sharing a perspective some individuals in question previously lacked, and could seriously benefit from.

annotations.text: Backseat gaming makes my own gaming experience very difficult due to the constant unnecessary buzzing noise in my ears that is barely even able to form coherent sentences nevertheless sentences that make any sense.
annotations.comment: This is a great connection between the writing and your own experience--I would be very interested to learn more about the concrete and specific details of some of these incidents.

annotations.text: criticism and advice can be very similar because they are both forms of feedback in hopes of improvement.
annotations.comment: This is a very generous evaluation. I imagine many people do not see criticism with the same positivity as you.

You're doing a great job here of making connections between your own personal experience and the essay. I'll excited to see how you continue to develop your own experiences, and I'm curious if you're going to employ a similar decision tree with your own peers.
